title: What health coverage do I have?
meta-title: What health coverage do I have?
meta-description: Select from a list of plan or programs you may be enrolled in.
bite: Select from a list of plan or programs you may be enrolled in.
page_name: What health coverage do I have?
page_topic: What health coverage do I have?
excerpt: You’ll be asked if you have health coverage through any of these sources:
content:
You’ll be asked if you have health coverage through any of these sources:

  • Medicaid: Don't select this if your Medicaid coverage pays for only a few benefits, like services only for pregnancy, family planning, emergency Medicaid, TB, or outpatient hospital care.
  • Children's Health Insurance Program (CHIP)
  • Medicare
  • TRICARE: A health care program for uniformed service members, retirees, and their families. Don't choose this if you have Direct Care or Line of Duty.
  • VA health care program: Health coverage for veterans (and, in certain circumstances, their dependents or survivors) who served in the active military, naval, or air service and were honorably discharged or released.
  • Peace Corps: Health coverage provided to Peace Corps volunteers during service.
  • Individual insurance (including Marketplace or other non-group coverage): Health coverage people pay for themselves that's not through an employer. It's available inside or outside the Marketplace.
